Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Wyden Siren Goes Off Again: We'll Be "Stunned" by NSA Under Section 702 39 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Two long-lost episodes of 'Doctor Who' have been found 40 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. Can I run AI locally? 199 upvotes, 41 comments
  4. What we learned from a 22-Day storage bug (and how we fixed it) 34 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. IMG_0416 (2024) 177 upvotes, 41 comments
  6. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 169 upvotes, 39 comments
  7. Dijkstra's Crisis: The End of Algol and Beginning of Software Engineering (2010) [pdf] 47 upvotes, 9 comments
  8. The Mrs Fractal: Mirror, Rotate, Scale (2025) 24 upvotes, 3 comments
  9. Willingness to look stupid 643 upvotes, 219 comments
  10. Lost Doctor Who Episodes Found 74 upvotes, 18 comments
  11. Gvisor on Raspbian 40 upvotes, 8 comments
  12. “This is not the computer for you” 833 upvotes, 313 comments
  13. OVH forgot they donated documentation hosting to Pandas 99 upvotes, 29 comments
  14. Ceno, browse the web without internet access 99 upvotes, 29 comments
  15. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 242 upvotes, 89 comments
  16. Meta Platforms: Lobbying, dark money, and the App Store Accountability Act 937 upvotes, 402 comments
  17. Enhancing gut-brain communication reversed cognitive decline in aging mice 367 upvotes, 173 comments
  18. Run NanoClaw in Docker Sandboxes 102 upvotes, 43 comments
  19. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 254 upvotes, 131 comments
  20. The Bovadium Fragments: Together with The Origin of Bovadium 34 upvotes, 12 comments
  21. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 77 upvotes, 35 comments
  22. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 382 upvotes, 222 comments
  23. Launch HN: Captain (YC W26) – Automated RAG for Files 21 upvotes, 6 comments
  24. E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May 242 upvotes, 138 comments
  25. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 262 upvotes, 170 comments
  26. NASA targets Artemis II crewed moon mission for April 1 launch 36 upvotes, 23 comments
  27. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 497 upvotes, 522 comments
  28. Show HN: Channel Surfer – Watch YouTube like it’s cable TV 46 upvotes, 36 comments
  29. Removing recursion via explicit callstack simulation 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 57 upvotes, 51 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 14 March 2026. Source here.
